en.chat_prechat_desc: Hi! Fill in the details below to start chatting with our team.
en.chat_greeting: Hi! 👋 How can we help you today?
en.chat_greeting_name: Hi {name}! 👋 How can we help you today?
en.chat_offline_desc: Leave a message and we'll reply ASAP.
en.chat_header_subtitle: Usually replies in a few minutes
en.chat_end_desc: Thank you for contacting us! Feel free to start a new chat anytime.

id.chat_prechat_desc: Halo! Isi data berikut untuk memulai chat dengan tim kami.
id.chat_greeting: Halo! 👋 Ada yang bisa kami bantu hari ini?
id.chat_greeting_name: Halo {name}! 👋 Ada yang bisa kami bantu hari ini?
id.chat_offline_desc: Tinggalkan pesan dan kami akan segera membalas.
id.chat_end_desc: Terima kasih sudah menghubungi kami! Silakan mulai chat baru kapan saja.
